# Karanova Platform

> https://karanova.io

Karanova is an AI-powered business management platform for Iranian and international markets.

## Core Products

### Inova - AI Business Intelligence
- Vision AI: Market analysis
- Govern AI: Risk management  
- Supply AI: Supply chain optimization
- Creative AI: Content generation

### TaskEase - AI Project Management
- Automated sprint planning
- Intelligent resource allocation
- 60% time reduction

### BIQ - Business Analytics Dashboard
- Real-time KPI tracking
- Interactive dashboards
- 92% analysis accuracy

## Key URLs

- Home: https://karanova.io
- Products: https://karanova.io/products/{inova,taskease,biq}
- Documentation: https://karanova.io/resources/documentation
- API: https://karanova.io/resources/api
- Blog: https://karanova.io/resources/blog
- Support: https://karanova.io/support
- Contact: hello@karanova.io

## Features

- 24/7 AI assistance
- Persian/English bilingual
- RTL support
- Multi-tenant architecture
- Real-time collaboration
- API integration

## Target Users

Entrepreneurs, project managers, business analysts, marketing teams, supply chain managers in Iran and Middle East.

## Technology

Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, AI/ML models

---

For detailed information: https://karanova.io/llm.txt
